use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF MODERATE-TO-SEVERE PAIN BY INTRAVENOUS INJECTION
MANAGEMENT OF MODERATE-TO-SEVERE PAIN BY INTRAVENOUS INJECTION IN PATIENTS WITH MILD RENAL IMPAIRMENT
MANAGEMENT OF MODERATE-TO-SEVERE PAIN BY INJECTION

indications.text:
ANJESO is indicated for use in adults for the management of moderate-to-severe pain, alone or
in combination with non-NSAID analgesics.
Limitation of Use
Because of delayed onset of analgesia, ANJESO alone is not recommended for use when rapid
onset of analgesia is required.

ANJESO is indicated for use in adults for the management of moderate-to-severe pain, alone or
in combination with non-NSAID analgesics.
Limitation of Use
Because of delayed onset of analgesia, ANJESO alone is not recommended for use when rapid
onset of analgesia is required.
